title: Ping Pong 3D
summary: A compact 3D table-tennis game that stays discoverable here while it remains a small standalone experiment.
note: It ships from its own repository, syncs into the lab automatically, and gives future mini-sites a clear pattern to follow.

title: Asteroids 3D
summary: A browser asteroid shooter from an earlier wave of vibe coding, kept here as a playable snapshot instead of a full standalone domain.
note: It is rougher than the newer lab entries, which is part of the point. The route makes room for experiments that are still interesting even when they are not polished enough to graduate.

title: Rally Rush
summary: A lightweight browser rally game with quick circuit selection, arcade controls, and a straightforward race loop that fits the lab's playable prototype shelf.
note: It stays in its own repository, syncs into the lab like the other prototypes, and broadens the catalog from shooters and table tennis into racing experiments.

title: Meeting Notes
previewAlt: Meeting Notes app preview showing saved notes and filters
summary: A lightweight browser note workspace for capturing meeting details, action items, deadlines, tags, and quick follow-up search from one screen.
note: It stays in its own repository, syncs into the lab from `main`, and expands the catalog beyond games into practical browser tooling.
